name: proxyflow
description: proxyflow — App Mock & API Proxy Platform

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.deploy: npm run build && pm2 restart ecosystem.config.js --update-env
scripts.pm2:restart: pm2 delete proxyflow-frontend && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js

author: shibazijiang <shibazijiang@gmail.com>
